In Development — Early Access Coming Soon

AssessAlign

Standards-Based Assessment Built for How Schools Actually Work

Designed by a classroom teacher and reading interventionist with 12+ years of experience, AssessAlign reflects real MTSS workflows — not a tech company's idea of what schools need.

Explore FeaturesRequest Early Access

BUILT WITH A MODERN STACK

Vue.js
React
N
Next.js
Supabase
OpenAI

The Problem

Assessments Shouldn't Create More Work

✕

Hours spent manually aligning questions to standards and building rubrics from scratch.

✕

Spreadsheet-based intervention grouping that takes an entire planning period to sort.

✕

Data scattered across platforms with no unified view of student mastery by standard.

✕

Generic EdTech tools built by people who have never managed a classroom or MTSS cycle.

What AssessAlign Does

Every Feature Built Around Standards Mastery

Not another dashboard full of numbers. AssessAlign connects assessment to action — from question creation to intervention grouping, every feature is designed to move the needle on student learning.

Standards-Based Assessment at Its Core

Every assessment, question, and data point aligns to academic standards — so teachers always know exactly what skills students have and haven't mastered, not just how they scored.

AI-Powered Question Generation

Generate assessment questions directly from reading passages using OpenAI. Questions align automatically to standards, support multiple choice and constructed response formats, and include difficulty level control — saving hours of prep time.

Real-Time Data Analytics

A live dashboard gives teachers and administrators a clear picture of student performance across standards, subjects, and classrooms. Data is triangulated across multiple sources so educators can spot discrepancies and make smarter decisions.

Flagship Feature

Automatic Intervention Grouping

The flagship differentiator. AssessAlign auto-generates WIN and FLEX groups based on assessment results — no more spending hours manually sorting spreadsheets. Teachers get ready-to-use groupings backed by real data.

Cross-Subject Performance Tracking

View and compare student performance across ELA and math in one place, including house and grade-level views — ideal for middle school team structures and cross-curricular collaboration.

FERPA-Compliant & Secure

Built with row-level security, AES-256 encryption, and full access logging. Student data is protected at the infrastructure level, giving districts and families peace of mind.

Where We Are

Development Roadmap

PHASE 01Complete

MVP Core

Core assessment engine, basic user auth, and initial database schema design.

PHASE 02In Progress

Beta Testing

Onboarding first 50 pilot users, refining UI/UX, and optimizing AI latency.

PHASE 03Upcoming

Scale & API

Public API release, multi-tenant architecture support, and payment integration.

PHASE 04Planned

Mobile Native

Dedicated iOS and Android applications for on-the-go grading and review.

Current Project Velocity

Tracking towards Version 1.0 Release

OVERALL COMPLETION85%
4MODULES BUILT
124COMMITS
99%UPTIME

Interested in Early Access?

AssessAlign is currently in active development with beta testing underway. If you're a school leader, coach, or district administrator looking for a smarter approach to standards-based assessment, get in touch.
